readme.title: Danilarious Star Atlas
readme.description: A generated catalog of starred GitHub repositories, grouped into stable categories.

site.title: Danilarious Star Atlas
site.heroDescription: Everything I've starred — organized, searchable, and browsable by category. Built on progressive chunk loading so it stays fast even as the list grows.

seo.description: A searchable, category-first catalog of starred GitHub repositories — built by Danilarious, powered by progressive chunk loading.
seo.ogDescription: Browse starred repositories by category, language, and recency. Built by Danilarious with progressive chunk loading and a clean dark interface.
seo.twitterDescription: Danilarious Star Atlas — searchable, filtered, sorted. Everything starred, nothing hidden.

manifest.description: A searchable catalog of starred GitHub repositories with category-first browsing and progressive chunk loading.
